source: Hand-listed 15-bar high/low series with pivots placed at known indices (highs peak at 2,7,12; lows trough at 2,7,12), and edge bars (indices 0,1,13,14) that can never be pivots under k=2. Expected values computed by an independent, from-spec reference implementation (scratchpad/gen_golden_p1b45.py, ref_swing_points): strict greater/less-than against all 2k neighbors, per SPRINT-P1B-indicators.md addendum, NOT by running tradekit's stub.
